purpose: Adds an early guard in hci_cmd_sync_queue: if HCI_UNREGISTER is set the function returns -ENODEV before allocating work, preventing queuing against an unregistered hdev and potential use-after-free after timeout.

Remove a stray #include <asm/termios.h> from drivers/tty/n_hdlc.c because linux/tty.h already provides linux/termios.h; this simplifies include usage and removes an unnecessary architecture-specific header.
Update perf c2c documentation to document a new 'N/A' store metric (stores where memory level is not available) in report tables; text changes clarify the new metric and how it's displayed.

Fixes hugetlb VMA lock handling: on vma open allocate a fresh vma_lock (avoid copying pointer from vm_area_dup), change unmap path to free/unlock the vma_lock (instead of clearing VM_MAYSHARE), require vma_lock for pmd sharing, and adjust callers to acquire/release locks in correct order to avoid races.
Document two regulator supplies (AVDD and MICVDD) for the Realtek rt5682s codec in its devicetree binding YAML and mark them required, aligning the binding with platform DT usage.
Add missing iounmap(hostdata->base) in zorro7xx_remove_one when host->base indicates an ioremap was done, ensuring mapped I/O is unmapped and avoiding a resource leak on device removal.
Remove an unused struct member (work_struct work) from mlx5e_async_ctx in the mlx5e kTLS transmit path; a small cleanup eliminating dead/unreferenced field with no behavioral change.
Change cfg80211_auth_request.key_idx from unsigned u8 to signed s8 so it can hold -1 sentinel values (range -1..3) when key is NULL, avoiding static-checker warnings and clarifying semantics.
Reorder/remove commented CONFIG_SURFACE_PLATFORMS lines in two RISC-V defconfigs so the option is sorted as savedefconfig does; purely configuration formatting with no functional change.

Introduce an inline helper mcp251xfd_is_fd_mode() that encapsulates the check for CAN-FD/listen-only mode and replace repeated open-coded ctrlmode checks with this function across FIFO and ring allocation code.

Update RTC selftests to skip when the RTC device file is absent: remove the hard ASSERT in fixture setup and add checks that call SKIP(return, ...) when open returns -1 and errno == ENOENT, avoiding test failures on systems without RTC hardware.
Remove a redundant/dead assignment to the local variable 'bytes' in echoaudio MIDI timer code; this eliminates a clang scan dead-store warning and does not change runtime behavior.

Decouples rcuscale from TASKS_RCU: removes automatic TASKS_RCU selection, conditionally compiles tasks_ops only when CONFIG_TASKS_RCU is set, and updates test configs so rcuscale can be built without enabling RCU Tasks.
Fix a duplicated word in a comment in arch/x86/kvm/mmu/spte.h (remove the extra "be split"); purely a comment typo correction with no code behavior changes.

Revert the previous DCFCLK-based clock-table population for DCN315 and instead derive clk entries from the DfPstateTable/SocVoltage mapping; detect the lowest DPM with a non-zero FClk and map dcf/soc clocks by matching voltages to avoid underflow when firmware leaves DCF clocks disabled.
Add renesas,r9a07g054-mali as a compatible entry and enum option in the arm,mali-bifrost devicetree binding YAML to document the Renesas RZ/V2L SoC (Mali-G31).

Rename the designware PCIe host struct from pcie_port to dw_pcie_rp and update all references/signatures across DW PCIe drivers and headers to make naming consistent with the dw_ prefix and distinguish host/root-port entities.
Change printf-style format from %#06hx to %#06x when printing ntohs(eth->h_proto) to match the promoted int type and silence -Wformat; this updates logging only and does not change runtime behavior.

Change ensures the upper bound BIT(25) is cast to long so the WARN_ON signed comparison treats negative offsets correctly, preventing spurious warnings and making the branch-range check semantically correct.
Remove the HW_VAR_H2C_FW_P2P_PS_OFFLOAD enum/case and call rtl8188e_set_p2p_ps_offload_cmd() directly from p2p code, eliminating an unnecessary HAL-layer indirection with no behavior change.

Makes a symbol file-local by adding 'static' to cavium_erratum_23154_cpus to address sparse's undeclared/visibility warnings introduced by errata additions; a small source-quality/visibility change with no behavior change.

Fix devicetree binding examples for MDSS consumers by removing the bogus interrupt flags cell (use single-cell interrupts = <0>) and adjust node labeling; aligns examples with the MDSS interrupt provider semantics.

Renames and generalizes dynamic-array handling in v4l2 controls: allocates array storage inside struct v4l2_ctrl_ref, renames flags/fields from dyn_array to array, updates allocation logic (req_alloc_array) and checks to allow drivers to change array sizes.
Adds new PMIC model strings and additional Qualcomm SoC ID mappings to drivers/soc/qcom/socinfo.c, extending the driver's database for identifying SoCs and PMICs.

Replace a switch that printed 'unknown' for chip_cut > E with logic mapping chip_cut 0..15 to letters 'A'..'P' and print as a char; simplifies code and expands revision reporting, no runtime behavior change.

Remove the redundant .is_enabled software state and related enable/disable/is_enabled ops from ux500 PRCMU clock driver because the core clock framework already maintains a software enable count; this simplifies the driver and eliminates duplicate state.

Reduces scattered #ifdef CONFIG_XIP_KERNEL usage in arch/riscv/mm/init.c by grouping XIP-only declarations and moving the pt_ops XIP_FIXUP macro next to the XIP guarded block, simplifying conditional compilation and keeping related XIP definitions adjacent.
Edits the sm6350 Lena device tree to set QUP and GPI DMA nodes (qupv3_id_0/1, gpi_dma0/1) to status = "okay", enabling those hardware blocks so I2C nodes using them can be added and function.

Fix comments and formatting in drivers/thermal/rzg2l_thermal.c: clarify TS_CODE_CAP_TIMES meaning, correct 'caliberation'→'calibration', and convert /* comments to be on separate lines to match coding style. No behavioral changes.

Replaces a busy-wait loop that could hang when the hardware semaphore cannot be acquired with an early error log and return, preventing indefinite blocking during resource release (e.g., on surprise-removed hardware).

Replace legacy master/slave DAI clocking terminology with modern provider/consumer terms in pcm3168a: rename variables, switch to SND_SOC_DAIFMT_CLOCK_PROVIDER_MASK, and update related checks and messages. Behavior is preserved.
Remove an always-redundant IS_SWAPFILE macro hack from fs/nfs/file.c (the macro is always defined), deleting dead preprocessor code and its comment; no functional behavior changes.

Implements GTP Echo Response handling: adds GTPv0/v1 echo validation and response functions, route lookup helpers, restart_count storage and IFLA_GTP_RESTART_COUNT netlink attribute, and sends Echo Responses when sockets are kernel-created.

Replaces uses of cpumask_next/_zero starting from -1 with cpumask_first/_zero where appropriate and adds cpumask_first_zero(), simplifying and slightly optimizing CPU-mask lookups and clarifying intent in several subsystems.

Removes the call to the firmware IOVAR 'dtim_assoc' and related TIM parsing fallback in brcmf_update_bss_info because firmware no longer supports that query; prevents repeated failure logs after STA roam.

Adds a new board configuration (adl_rt5682) and ACPI match entry to support the ALC5682 headset codec on Alder Lake platforms without a speaker amplifier, wiring the codec to SSP0 and providing appropriate firmware/topology names.

Add an explicit check in io_sendmsg_zc to return -EOPNOTSUPP when the socket lacks SOCK_SUPPORT_ZC, mirroring earlier zerocopy send handling and preventing attempts to use zerocopy on unsupported protocols.

Add a conditional test for xeCJK.sty in the Sphinx LaTeX preamble and only load xeCJK when both the Noto Sans CJK font and xeCJK.sty are available; adjust user messages accordingly to avoid xelatex errors on minimal texlive installs.
Updates scripts/checkpatch.pl to treat lines beginning with 'case' as exceptions in the complex-macro check, preventing spurious warnings for 'case ...' macro patterns used in drivers.

Convert drivers/gpu/drm/tiny/simpledrm.c from simple-KMS helpers to the regular DRM atomic helpers: add atomic headers, replace drm_simple_display_pipe with explicit drm_plane/crtc/encoder, implement atomic_check/update/disable helpers and init code; commit message states no functional changes.

Add a JPEG decode worker and multicore decode support for MT8195: allocate/free HW slots, set HW params, worker routine to schedule decode jobs on multiple HW engines, waitqueue/workqueue and bookkeeping to run three decoders in parallel.

Removes numerous VPRINTK() debug prints and the ata_scsi_dump_cdb() helper across libata files, relying on tracepoints instead; this reduces redundant verbose kernel logging and cleans up dead debug code.

Enable entering zstate (z9/z10) during extended vblank when entering FREESYNC_STATE_VIDEO: compute extra vblank time, allow zstate entry if gained time >5 ms, compute/write optimized min_dst_y_next_start, add support flags, hubp extended-blank programming, and stream update plumbing.

Adjust the hqd_destroy callback prototype in kgd_kfd_interface.h so the third parameter is enum kfd_preempt_type (matching all implementations) instead of uint32_t, eliminating a Clang kCFI type-mismatch that caused runtime CFI failures on certain AMD GPUs.

Fixes the STM32 pinctrl device-tree binding YAML: renames the incorrect 'reset' property to the correct 'resets' and adds additionalProperties: false to the gpio node pattern to tighten validation and prevent unnoticed schema errors.

Adds a Makefile tweak for ath9k to append -Wno-array-bounds to CFLAGS when KBUILD_EXTRA_WARN is not set, silencing a GCC 12 array-bounds warning; this is a temporary build-warning suppression for the driver directory.

Replace pm_runtime_get_sync + manual put_noidle-on-error with pm_runtime_resume_and_get in sun8i-ss PRNG code to simplify runtime-PM handling and remove an extra error-path call; behavior is preserved but code is clearer.

Moves fixed-file installation/removal into io_uring's filetable module, replaces request-based helpers with ctx-based helpers (io_ring_ctx), adds __io_fixed_fd_install and io_fixed_fd_remove, adjusts locking and call sites, and updates headers to centralize filetable operations.

Reworks the imx8mq VPU device-tree binding to split the combined VPU node into separate G1 and G2 compatibles, limits reg/interrupt/clock counts to per-block, and adds vpu-blk-ctrl power-domain support and updated examples to describe independent decoder blocks.

Inline the single-use IWL_DEVICE_BZ_COMMON macro into IWL_DEVICE_BZ in iwlwifi cfg/22000.c, removing an unnecessary intermediate macro and slightly reformatting the device configuration; purely mechanical simplification with no semantic change.
